zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Hewett於1501年出生在英國越可爾威爾斯時，他的父親Edmund Hewitt26歲，母親Catherine Essex17歲。他於1540年與Alice Leveson在英國英格蘭賀特福爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1567年1月25日在英國英格蘭倫敦聖 克萊門特 易亞斯亞普 煙雨 聖 馬丁 奧爾加享年66歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦聖 克萊門特 易亞斯亞普 煙雨 聖 馬丁 奧爾加。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Hewett于1501年出生在英国越可爾威爾斯时，他的父亲Edmund Hewitt26岁，母亲Catherine Essex17岁。他于1540年与Alice Leveson在英国英格兰賀特福爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1567年1月25日在英国英格兰倫敦聖 克萊門特 易亞斯亞普 煙雨 聖 馬丁 奧爾加享年66岁，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦聖 克萊門特 易亞斯亞普 煙雨 聖 馬丁 奧爾加。

nameMeanings.name: Hewett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Hewitt
meanings: from the Middle English personal name Hewet, Huet, Hughet, Howet, pet forms of Hugh (Middle English Hewe, Hue; see Hugh and compare Hew ). The spelling Hughet stood for both Huet and the synonymous Huget; see Huggett . This surname has also been established in Ireland since the 14th century.

habitational name from Hewitts in Chelsfield or Hewitts in Willesborough (both Kent), both named from Old English hīewett ‘cutting’, denoting a place where trees had been cut down. Here there lived families called de la Hewatte (1270), de la hewett (1301), and atte Hewete (1338). The name may also be topographic for someone who lived in a newly made clearing in a wood.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Hewett was born in 1501, in Wales, Yorkshire, England, his father, Edmund Hewitt, was 26 and his mother, Catherine Essex, was 17. He married Alice Leveson in 1540, in Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 25 January 1567, in St Clement Eastcheap with St Martin Orgar, London, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 66, and was buried in St Clement Eastcheap with St Martin Orgar, London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Hewett est né en 1501, à Wales, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Edmund Hewitt, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Catherine Essex, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Alice Leveson en 1540, à Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 25 janvier 1567, à St Clement Eastcheap with St Martin Orgar, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à St Clement Eastcheap with St Martin Orgar, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Hewett è nato il nel 1501 nel Wales, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Edmund Hewitt, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Catherine Essex, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Alice Leveson nel 1540, nel Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 25 gennaio 1567, nel St Clement Eastcheap with St Martin Orgar, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolto a St Clement Eastcheap with St Martin Orgar, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Hewettが1501年にイギリスヨークシュアイアワレスで生まれた時，父Edmund Hewittは26歳，母Catherine Essexは17歳であった。1540年にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアでAlice Levesonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1567年1月25日にイギリスイギリスロンドンスト クレメント エアストチェアップ ウィス スト マルティン オルガーで66歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンスト クレメント エアストチェアップ ウィス スト マルティン オルガーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Hewett(이)가 1501년 영국 요르크실르 월스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Edmund Hewitt(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Catherine Essex(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1540년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르에서 Alice Leveson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1567년 1월 25일 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 클레멘트 이스트체아프 위스 스트 마틴 르가에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 클레멘트 이스트체아프 위스 스트 마틴 르가에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Hewett nasceu em 1501, em Wales, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Edmund Hewitt, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Essex, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Leveson em 1540, em Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 25 de janeiro de 1567, em St Clement Eastcheap with St Martin Orgar, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em St Clement Eastcheap with St Martin Orgar, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Hewett родился в 1501 г. в местности веилесь, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Edmund Hewitt было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine Essex, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Leveson в 1540 г. в местности хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 25 января 1567 г. в местности ст клемент эасчип вит ст мартинь оргар, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности ст клемент эасчип вит ст мартинь оргар, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Hewett nació en 1501, en Wales, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Edmund Hewitt, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Catherine Essex, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Alice Leveson en 1540, en Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 25 de enero de 1567, en St Clement Eastcheap with St Martin Orgar, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultado en St Clement Eastcheap with St Martin Orgar, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
